Common.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again later.

appInfo.title: Thank you so much for visiting <bold>Kallong</bold>!
appInfo.share: If you enjoyed the project, please share it with others.

notice.title: Notice
notice.anonymousEdit: • Lookbooks saved by users who are not signed in cannot be edited or searched. <bold>Please make sure to save the URL!</bold>
notice.anonymousDelete: • Data from users who are not signed in is deleted periodically, so please save voting results in advance.
notice.feedback: • Feedback is always welcome. We'll do our best to reflect it.

Auth.passwordPolicy: 8 to 20 characters, including at least 2 of letters, numbers, or special characters

terms.privacyPolicy: Consent to collection and use of personal information

profile.nicknameChangeFail: Failed to change nickname. Please try again later.

updatePassword.title: Change password
updatePassword.description: Enter a new password different from your previous one
updatePassword.fail: Failed to change password. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: We'll send a password reset link to your email.
resetPassword.succeed: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
resetPassword.fail: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: If you delete your account, all information will be deleted. Are you sure you want to continue?

validation.passwordInvalidPattern: Include at least two of uppercase/lowercase letters, numbers, or special characters.
validation.nicknameInvalidPattern: Only uppercase/lowercase letters, Korean characters, and numbers are allowed.

error.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
error.over_email_send_rate_limit: Email send limit exceeded. Please try again later.
error.unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.

validation.descriptionMax: Memo must be 500 characters or fewer.
